Luma.greeting: Hi! I'm Luma, your AI assistant.

Luma.greetingAfternoon: Good afternoon! How's your day going?
Luma.greetingEvening: Good evening! Let's wrap up your day.
Luma.moodConcerned: You have a lot on your plate. Let me help.
Luma.moodUrgent: Heads up — a deadline is approaching.
Luma.moodEncouraging: You're doing great, keep it up!

Tasks.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your filters or create a new task to get started.
Tasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.description: Hi! I'm Luma, your AI assistant.
step1.body: Lumina is an intelligent calendar that helps you schedule tasks, analyze priorities, and manage your time automatically. Let's get started!

step2.title: Working Hours
step2.description: Set your working hours so Luma can schedule tasks at the right time.

step3.title: Display Preferences
step3.description: Customize Lumina to match your style.

step4.title: Luma's Personality
step4.description: Choose how Luma communicates with you.
step4.formalSample: Good morning. You have 3 important tasks today. I recommend starting with the monthly report.
step4.friendlySample: Hey! You've got 3 tasks today. How about starting with the monthly report? Easy peasy!
step4.cheerfulSample: Hi there~! We've got 3 awesome tasks waiting for us today! Let's crush that monthly report first! 🎉
step4.motivationalSample: New day, new opportunities! You have 3 tasks to conquer. Start with the monthly report — you've got this! 💪

step6.title: All Set!
step6.description: Everything is ready. Let's start using Lumina!

greeting.formal: Welcome. I'm ready to help you manage your schedule efficiently.
greeting.friendly: Yay! All set! Let's organize your schedule together!
greeting.cheerful: Wow~! So excited! We're going to make every day amazing together! 🌟
greeting.motivational: Your journey to peak productivity starts now! I'll be right here with you every step of the way! 🚀

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to Lumina — Luma is ready to help manage your schedule
Dashboard.greeting: Good morning! Here's your day at a glance.
Dashboard.bestFocusDesc: Your productivity peaks in the morning. Schedule deep work here.
Dashboard.tasksAtRiskDesc: These tasks are approaching their deadlines. Consider prioritizing them.
Dashboard.weeklyCompletionDesc: You're on track! Complete 2 more tasks to hit your weekly goal.

AI.optimizeDesc: Luma will arrange your tasks within working hours (09:00–18:00)

DailyBriefing.summary: Today you have {tasks} tasks, {meetings} meetings, {highPriority} high priority
DailyBriefing.focusRecommendation: Your peak productivity is {time}. Schedule deep work here.
DailyBriefing.noTasks: No tasks today — enjoy your free time!

WeeklyReview.title: Weekly Review
WeeklyReview.streakMessage: Keep it up! You're on fire!
WeeklyReview.recommendationText: Focus on high-priority tasks early in the week. Your productivity peaks on Tuesday and Wednesday.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.subtitle: Track your productivity and habits
Analytics.scoreDesc: Based on task completion and consistency

hero.title: Lumina
hero.tagline: The intelligent calendar that understands you
hero.description: Meet Luma — your AI assistant that schedules tasks, analyzes priorities, and manages your time automatically

features.title: Features designed for you
features.subtitle: Every tool you need to manage your time intelligently

aiScheduling.title: AI Smart Scheduling
aiScheduling.description: AI analyzes all your tasks and schedules them automatically, picking the best time for each one

priorityIntelligence.title: Priority Intelligence
priorityIntelligence.description: Luma calculates priority scores from multiple factors, helping you know what to tackle first

focusMode.title: Focus Mode
focusMode.description: Hide all notifications and enter deep work mode with a built-in Pomodoro Timer

smartRecommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
smartRecommendations.description: Luma learns your behavior and recommends the best time for each type of task

calendarViews.title: Calendar Views Day/Week/Month
calendarViews.description: Switch views seamlessly with drag-and-drop and keyboard shortcuts

quickCapture.title: Quick Capture
quickCapture.description: Add tasks from any page with a single shortcut. Luma analyzes and categorizes them automatically

howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Start managing your time intelligently right away

step1.title: Add your tasks
step1.description: Create tasks, appointments, deadlines, and events quickly and easily

step2.title: Luma analyzes
step2.description: AI calculates priorities, detects conflicts, and finds the best time slots

step3.title: Perfect schedule
step3.description: Get an optimized schedule with Luma's recommendations throughout the day

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlock the full power of AI

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for people who love managing time
